title: MoceanAPI SMS Notification is here. Automate your SMS!

posts.author: wk_kong (Woon Kit Kong)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’ve built MoceanAPI Send SMS to make it possible to Broadcast SMS and Send Automated SMS to your contacts in your boards

Here’s what you can do with our App:

  1. Broadcast SMS to items in your boards
  2. Send Automated Notification using pre-made recipe (For eg: send sms to item when their status changed)

This app is for you if you’re:

  1. A landlord who wants to remind your tenants to pay their rent on time via SMS.
  2. A marketing manager who wants to send promotional offers to your customer when their sales stage changed (For eg: sending coupon code to customers who signed up from specific advertising campaign.)
  3. A growth hacker who wants more eyeballs / impressions for your offer. (Your emails have higher chances of landing in the Spam folder, compared to SMS)

Send SMS in less than 3 minutes

  1. Sign up for an account here
  2. Install MoceanAPI Send SMS app here
  3. Add new widget in your Items and select MoceanAPI
  4. Authenticate your account and key in the API Key and API Secret as well as the Sender
  5. You’re all set and ready to send SMS!

App is free, so you’ll only need to purchase SMS credits

posts.author: Okudama (Oswaldo)
posts.cookedHtml: Does anyone know if there are limits on how many SMS you can send daily with this app?

posts.author: LillyBates (Lilly)
posts.cookedHtml: This looks like a handy tool for automating those little tasks that eat up time. We once set up an automated SMS system to keep our team updated when any status changed on a project board. Setting it up with an app that lets you send messages in just a few clicks really takes out the stress. One time, when we needed phone numbers for verification for a promo campaign, we found Tardigrada super useful for verifying numbers quickly. Having something like this in place means fewer emails ending up in spam and better reach with SMS. Definitely worth it if you’re juggling notifications or promotions and need something simple to set up.
